overview: Quick Convert helps users convert images, audio, and video into common formats without leaving Misty.
capabilities: Convert files between common image, audio, and video formats
Batch process selected assets in one pass
Choose output format, quality, and destination before exporting
permissions: Optional shell access for converter backends
getting_started: Select one or more media files in Files.
Choose an output format and destination, then start the conversion.
changelog: v0.1.0 - Initial plugin template for media conversion workflows.
